title: Layered Constitution Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan for multi-layer constitution support with strategic merge, $delete directives, and provenance tracking.
notes: This is a task-by-task implementation plan (file map, phased checkboxes) rather than prose documentation, but does not match ADR/PRD/SPEC hallmarks (no decision/consequences, no user stories, no endpoint/schema contracts standalone from implementation steps). Classified as DOC for context-only precedence; the referenced design spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-07-layered-constitution-design.md is a stronger SPEC candidate and should be classified separately if present in the ingest set.
